summary: Use the OpenAI node for supported OpenAI-powered tasks inside n8n, including model-driven operations and tool-enabled patterns described in the official documentation.
description: This node exposes OpenAI-related functionality through an official n8n integration. It is relevant when users want AI generation or model-connected capabilities through the built-in OpenAI node instead of generic HTTP calls.
why_use_it: Use this node when the needed OpenAI interaction is directly supported by n8n's official node.
when_to_use: when a workflow needs a supported OpenAI capability
when a built-in AI integration is preferable to custom API calls
when tool-enabled AI behavior fits the documented setup
when_not_to_use: when a required endpoint or advanced API feature is not supported by the node
when a lower-level custom call is required through HTTP Request

credentials.notes: Use configured OpenAI credentials supported by n8n.

operations: supported OpenAI tasks exposed by the node
templates_examples: official examples and templates listed on the node page
unsupported_ops_guidance: If a required operation is not supported by the OpenAI node, use HTTP Request for direct API access.
version_notes: Track visible notes about replacements or newer supported APIs from the official node page.
limitations: limited to the operations and settings exposed by the node
advanced or newly released API features may not appear immediately
gotchas: users may ask for an API feature that exists in OpenAI but not in the n8n node
tool behavior and AI orchestration can overlap with cluster AI nodes

selection_rules: Prefer this node for supported OpenAI tasks inside n8n.
Use HTTP Request when the requested OpenAI capability is not supported by the node.
disambiguation: Do not confuse this action node with OpenAI-related cluster sub-nodes such as chat model nodes.
This node is different from AI Agent; AI Agent orchestrates agent behavior while this node provides OpenAI-specific functionality.
